existing_features.title: Create a home page displaying a scrollable list of all 114 surahs showing surah number, Arabic name, English name, number of verses, and revelation type
Make each surah in the list clickable to navigate to a detailed surah reading page
Create a surah reading page that displays the surah title, metadata, and all verses with verse numbers, Arabic text, and English translations
Style Arabic text appropriately with proper font rendering and right-to-left text direction support

Design a clean, respectful visual theme with calming colors, elegant typography, and spacious layout that reflects the reverent nature of Quranic content, using warm earth tones or deep greens with cream or off-white backgrounds

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a backend data model to store Quran surahs (chapters) with surah number, Arabic name, English transliteration, English translation, number of verses, and revelation type (Meccan/Medinan)
Create a backend data model to store Quran verses with surah number, verse number, Arabic text, and English translation
Implement backend query functions to retrieve list of all surahs and to retrieve all verses for a specific surah by surah number
